aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business prominently due to insufficient structured data and conversational content. However, with targeted improvements, they can significantly boost their AI visibility.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ page with common HVAC queries and detailed answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate hours, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Expand NAP listings to additional relevant directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Lack of Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of structured data limits AI comprehension of their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' and '24-hour HVAC service Concord'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with clear service and location information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on HVAC maintenance and repair, positioning them as local experts.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for local HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup, causing AI models to overlook their services in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend their business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; delaying action will result in lost market share.
